report.summary: Standup v9 (~07:00 CET): 332 pages live (+1 HIP-3 guide Day 38 published), PUBLISH_QUEUE has 3 items (aztec-network-guide + ETH 2026 roadmap + DeFi options guide from build-v6), P0 next.config.ts blocker persists, FOMC now T-2 (Wed Mar 18), rate limiter still 0/6 — 5 of 6 agents ran last cycle (no eod).

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Standup v8 (06:10 CET)
items: Pages live: 332 (+1 from v8's 331). publish-v4 promoted /learn/hyperliquid-hip3-tokenized-futures-guide (Day 38) from PUBLISH_QUEUE to PUBLISHED_PAGES and triggered Vercel deploy 6taa7Wxsx. Page is live in production.

PUBLISH_QUEUE: Now 3 items — /learn/aztec-network-guide (Day 37, carried), /learn/ethereum-2026-upgrade-roadmap (NEW — build-v6), /learn/defi-options-trading-guide (NEW — build-v6). All ready for next publish cycle.

Build-v6 shipped: 2 new learn guides — ethereum-2026-upgrade-roadmap (2,400 words, Fusaka+Glamsterdam+Hegota, upgrade timeline table) and defi-options-trading-guide (2,700 words, calls/puts, 4 Greeks, 4-protocol comparison, DOV yield 5–20% APY). Interactive OptionsPnLCalculator.tsx component (call/put + buy/sell, inline SVG P&L chart, break-even marker). 5 internal links each. Full Article + FAQ JSON-LD on both.

Design cycle ran post-v8: UX audit + accessibility hardening on both new pages + OptionsPnLCalculator (aria-live, aria-pressed, 44px touch targets, focus rings). OG images created for both pages: og-defi-options-trading-guide.svg/png + og-ethereum-2026-upgrade-roadmap.svg/png.

Community-v20 complete: Social calendar for Mar 16–23 fully stocked. FOMC Day (Mar 18) reaction tweet drafted for both cut and hold scenarios. DeFi options + ETH roadmap threads queued Mar 17+19. Post-FOMC weekly newsletter written for Mar 19. HIP-3 announcement queued Mar 23. social-defi-options-guide.svg created for DeFi options page social card.

GSC organic signals: Day 17 confirmed — organic clicks arriving. FOMC is T-2 today (Mar 16). DCA calculator + stablecoin yield + defi-yields pages in peak intent window. DeFi options guide uniquely positioned for FOMC vol spike (Vega sensitivity) on Mar 18. Ethereum roadmap targets ePBS/Glamsterdam narrative ahead of mid-2026 upgrade.

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over
items: SHIPPED ✅ publish-v4 — Hyperliquid HIP-3 guide promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES (Day 38). Vercel deploy 6taa7Wxsx triggered. Pages live: 332.
SHIPPED ✅ build-v6 — ethereum-2026-upgrade-roadmap + defi-options-trading-guide guides written + scaffolded. OptionsPnLCalculator.tsx component built. 3 new files added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.
SHIPPED ✅ design — Accessibility pass on OptionsPnLCalculator + both new learn pages. OG images for ETH roadmap + DeFi options. BackToTop components added. Audit findings logged.
SHIPPED ✅ community-v20 — Social calendar Mar 17–23 filled. FOMC reaction tweet + DeFi options + ETH roadmap + HIP-3 threads + post-FOMC newsletter ready. social-defi-options-guide.svg created.

BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Staged next.config.ts still drops `output: 'standalone'` — 3rd consecutive cycle this is P0. Fix: `git restore --staged next.config.ts`. Blocking all 438 staged files from committing. Vercel build would break without standalone output.
BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Staged deletions: badges/page.tsx + courses/page.tsx + courses/[slug]/page.tsx — 3 routes go 404 if committed. Must verify intent before any commit.
BLOCKER 🔴 middleware.ts working-tree merge conflict — must resolve before commit.
CARRY-OVER 🔴 Rate limiter: 0/6 API routes protected. FOMC T-2. checkRateLimit() wired to zero routes. ~30 min programmer task — HIGHEST ROI technical task with hard Wednesday deadline.

CARRY-OVER 🔴 438 staged files uncommitted — crypto-cards hub (31 pages), compare pages (92), courses, badges, airdrops, 4 new API routes. Doubly blocked: P0 config + JSON-LD validation on compare/crypto-cards.
CARRY-OVER 🔴 WalletConnect production Project ID — Jefe action required; blocks gamification + referral hooks.
CARRY-OVER 🔴 GitHub Actions secrets — Jefe ~15 min; blocks Playwright CI.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 DefiLlama /api/defi-yields has no hardcoded fallback — total API failure returns 500 with no graceful degradation. (Flagged by publish-v4.)
CARRY-OVER 🟡 HIP-3 guide missing Breadcrumb component — now live in production with inline breadcrumb. Non-blocking.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 AICourseRecommendations.tsx — 2 curly apostrophe TS errors (non-blocking, suppressedby ignoreBuildErrors).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 Vercel trial — ~8 days remaining. Jefe: add payment method.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 ~100 published slugs missing page.tsx (30% returning 404 in prod). Phased scaffolding needed.
UPCOMING ⚡ Publish Day 37 + Day 38 Part 2: promote aztec-network-guide + ethereum-2026-upgrade-roadmap + defi-options-trading-guide (or batch 2 of 3) in next publish cycle.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — Resolve P0 staged blockers and commit the 438-file batch (CARRIED P0 — 3rd cycle). The 3-step sequence: (1) `git restore --staged next.config.ts` — restores standalone output, prevents breaking 332 live pages on next Vercel deploy; (2) decide on badges/courses staged deletions — if intentional remove from list, if not `git restore --staged`; (3) resolve middleware.ts merge conflict. All 3 steps are programmer tasks, no Jefe input needed. Estimated 15–20 minutes. The 438-file batch (crypto-cards, compare pages, 4 API routes) has been held hostage by this blocker for 3 cycles. Ship it.

PRIORITY 2 — Wire rate limiter across all 6 API routes BEFORE end of day (FOMC tomorrow, T-1). Organic traffic is live (GSC Day 17), FOMC vol spike hits tomorrow. checkRateLimit() needs to be imported into /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields, /api/fear-greed. This is ~30 min of work. With DeFi options guide live and FOMC triggering max vol/DCA/yield query intent, leaving 6 API routes unprotected on rate-decision day is unacceptable risk. Do this cycle.

PRIORITY 3 — Publish Day 37 + ETH roadmap + DeFi options (3-page batch). Aztec-network-guide has been in PUBLISH_QUEUE for 2 cycles. Ethereum 2026 roadmap is fresh and timely ahead of Glamsterdam narrative. DeFi options guide is uniquely positioned for FOMC vol-spike amplification on Mar 18 (Vega sensitivity + on-chain options volume 10x YoY). Publish all 3 in the next publish cycle, then add DefiLlama fallback data to /api/defi-yields as a quick follow-on fix (flagged by publish-v4 as hardcoded fallback missing — important before defi-yields query surge around FOMC).
